creator: agv@tomsknet.ru
text:
When authentication users in jail(8) controlled over NIS+ and unprivileged
user attempt run command, executed "getpwent" (top, ls-l, etc.) - system
rebooted.
When these command run root - system worked!
It is bug in jail or,  may be, misconfigured NIS+?

How-To-Repeat: Any time. Any run these command as unprivileged user.
